description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad white reflective stripes encircling its midsection, both of which show signs of dirt and wear. The surface of the cone is slightly rough and appears to be made of flexible rubber or plastic, with visible scuff marks and grime, especially near the base. The base itself is black, thick, and flat, designed to keep the cone upright and prevent tipping, and it also shows signs of wear and dirt accumulation. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the object.
description: A tall, orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, black square base, showing visible dirt and wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and a dirty, worn black base.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, with slightly different dirt patterns and scuff marks on the base and cone.
description_view_2: Another side showing the same cone features, with more visible grime on the lower stripe and base.
description_view_3: Rear view with the orange cone, white stripes, and the most visible dirt and wear on the base edges.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the middle and one closer to the base.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is a thick, flat, black square, wider than the cone itself, providing stability and showing visible wear and dirt.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks and grime, especially on the base and lower cone.
